items.claim: Nasim Sadikov is significantly better than Mateus Camilo in the striking department.
items.quote: The striking's not even really comparable. Nasim Sadikov is still a really good kickboxer and significantly better than Mateus Camilo.

items.claim: Mateus Camilo lacks high-level skills in any area of MMA.
items.quote: He's not that good of a fighter. He's not really great anywhere.

items.claim: Nasim Sadikov has a significant grappling advantage over Mateus Camilo.
items.quote: Grappling-wise, he's not going to touch Nasim Sadikov.

items.claim: Azamat Bibulatov is a top-five grappler in the 125-pound division.
items.quote: Azamat Bibulatov is a top five grappler at 125.

items.claim: Charles Johnson historically struggles against grapplers.
items.quote: Johnson also historically loses to grapplers as well.

items.claim: Charles Johnson is an inconsistent fighter who fluctuates between beating good fighters and losing to bad ones.
items.quote: He's one of these guys that beats bad fight no beat a beats good fighters and loses to bad fighters.

items.claim: Azamat Bibulatov has questionable stand-up skills.
items.quote: He's never really had the best stand up.
